1.premise: Being compared to Danny Masterson implies disgust about rape, but reveals disgust about Scientology.
Coinstar use is widely understood as broke behavior but rarely said aloud.

lines.text: Yo, yo, yo, what's going on y'all?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: How's it going tonight?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah, yeah, so I was told recently, y'all, that I look like Hyde from that '70s show.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And, uh, yeah, I don't know if you keep up with the news or nothing like that, but, uh,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah, just pretty disgusting to be compared to somebody who's a known
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Scientologist, you know what I mean guys?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know because there's nothing worse than that right guys, right?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Now I'm just gonna need to do a couple rapes though. He did do a couple rapes.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: So I just like to think that the guy that compared me to him was like I haven't seen him on anything in a while.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like I love that 70s show. What's he been in? And I was like, I don't know. You're probably not gonna see him in anything actually.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You're probably gonna fucking see him in jail. You'll see him there.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But yeah, yeah, so don't really fuck with that.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But you know what I do fuck with though?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I actually have a question, guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I have a question for the audience.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Be honest.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Does anybody out here use the coin star?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Has anybody used the coin star before?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Make some noise.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Broke-ass bitches.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm not talking shit though,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'cause I'm a broke-ass bitch, obviously.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm a comic, right?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But if you haven't used the coin star,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if you don't know what it is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: it's this fun little machine you'll find tucked away
lines.label: setup

lines.text: in the corner of the Walmart, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And you just bring all your saved up coins
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and you just fuck--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: (loud whooshing)
